'''shanava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacquisition|deacquisition]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacquisition|deacquisition]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shanava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shænævæth|shænævæth]] || [[word:shænævæj|shænævæj]] || [[word:shænævæsh|shænævæsh]] || [[word:shænævæ|shænævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shananavath|shananavath]] || [[word:shananavaj|shananavaj]] || [[word:shananavash|shananavash]] || [[word:shananava|shananava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanavath|shanavath]] || [[word:shanavaj|shanavaj]] || [[word:shanavash|shanavash]] || [[word:shanava|shanava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanafvath|shanafvath]] || [[word:shanafvaj|shanafvaj]] || [[word:shanafvash|shanafvash]] || [[word:shanafvaf|shanafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shanavatha|shanavatha]] || [[word:shanavaja|shanavaja]] || [[word:shanavasha|shanavasha]] || [[word:shanavaka|shanavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shanavath|shanavath]] || [[word:shanavaj|shanavaj]] || [[word:shanavash|shanavash]] || [[word:shanava|shanava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shanavathal|shanavathal]] || [[word:shanavajal|shanavajal]] || [[word:shanavashal|shanavashal]] || [[word:shanavakal|shanavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shanavathatha|shanavathatha]] || [[word:shanavajaja|shanavajaja]] || [[word:shanavashasha|shanavashasha]] || [[word:shanavaka|shanavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shanavathan|shanavathan]] || [[word:shanavajan|shanavajan]] || [[word:shanavashan|shanavashan]] || [[word:shanavakan|shanavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shanavathaoro|shanavathaoro]] || [[word:shanavajaoro|shanavajaoro]] || [[word:shanavashaoro|shanavashaoro]] || [[word:shanavakaoro|shanavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
